active_work.text: Mission-control metrics remain 25/68 verified, 1 active, 0 blocked, and 1 deferred. The R/Julia 100-slice finish run is ledgered in `finish-100-slices.tsv` with S001-S043 banked and S044-S100 queued. The Ayumi phylo-balance arc now has its own validator-owned sidecar ledger in `ayumi-phylo-balance-100-slices.tsv`: A001-A020 bank issue access, tracker status, forbidden wording, route vocabulary, and reply gates; A021-A030 bank native TMB ML balance evidence for univariate Gaussian phylo fit targets, mismatch errors, bootstrap accounting, broad recovery smokes, scale-side diagnostics, and the native ML summary; A031-A040 bank the native REML asymmetry evidence and derivation-gap note, preserving exact-Gaussian mean-side-only native REML while keeping scale-side, matched `mu`/`sigma`, q2, and q4 phylogenetic REML unsupported; A041-A050 bank experimental Julia bridge readiness, including pure R REML gates, a configured live matched sigma-phylo REML bridge smoke, direct DRM.jl location-only diagnostic status, and bridge parity rows for mean-only, sigma-side, and matched phylo REML cells; A051-A060 bank bivariate q4 native ML point/status truth, q2-plus-q2 separation, derived-correlation interval boundaries, q4 bootstrap accounting, and the 250-tip profile-budget status row; A061-A070 bank Ayumi data-readiness from persisted artifacts, noting the raw /tmp bundle is absent here, Model A+ is the clean full-data anchor, q4/fallback artifacts are diagnostic, and the Model A+ plus q4 harness scripts are the rerun entry points; A071-A080 bank the inference gap ledger, including row-specific Wald/profile/bootstrap/coverage status, boundary-status rows, a direct-DRM.jl q4 profile/bootstrap audit, and the parity contract that blocks bridge or interval promotion; A081-A090 bank the literature/docs wave, including the public location-scale tutorial motivation, brms/glmmTMB contrast, PC-prior and PLSM reference anchors, a one-observation-per-tip data-design note, formula grammar sync, README and limitations sync, an applied-user stub, and a local dashboard panel plan; A091-A098 bank a non-postable reply-readiness gate, A099 is blocked until explicit approval, and A100 banks the after-arc closeout report. The validator also checks `ayumi-phylo-balance-vocabulary.tsv`, `ayumi-phylo-balance-trackers.tsv`, `ayumi-inference-coverage-ledger.tsv`, and `ayumi-boundary-status-ledger.tsv`, including the unreadable external Ayumi issue boundary, internal tracker evidence that a prior reply exists, and the open blockers drmTMB#555, drmTMB#570, DRM.jl#291, and DRM.jl#293. HSquared transfer work remains partial and exact-Gaussian-only: no bridge row is promoted, q4/non-Gaussian routes keep observed-information/profile/bootstrap wording, and no 10k sigma-phylo interval claim is made.
